Continuous font-size

This lead paragraph is set to twenty-two pixels, larger than body text but not a heading — a size the old bitmap engine could never render.

11px: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

13px: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

16px: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

20px: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

28px: the quick brown fox.

Body text with an inline 24px span mid-sentence, then back to normal size, and a tiny 10px span too.

A whole paragraph at eighteen pixels via an inline style attribute, anti-aliased and smoothly scaled.
